editorial_note: Timely WWDC 2026 announcement piece. Tim Cook succession claim is well-sourced via Fortune and Spyglass (M.G. Siegler). Pre-announcement iOS 27 feature details are correctly attributed to Bloomberg/Gurman via 9to5Mac. Minor: article states board announcement was April 21; actual date was April 20 per sources. Minor sourcing imprecision on foldable iPhone detail. Neither issue affects substance. Approved as-is.
